site.metaDescription: Themadhood's PI Solutions is the Raspberry Pi branch under Themadhood's Codes, covering relays, automations, and utilities.

hero.headline: Themadhood's PI Solutions
body: Themadhood's PI Solutions is the Raspberry Pi development branch operating within Themadhood's Codes. It exists to build repeatable deployments, practical utilities, and real-world automation systems designed to run reliably on Pi-based infrastructure.

This branch focuses on tools that bridge software and hardware, including relay control, Pi-focused automation frameworks, and utility tooling intended for long-term operation. The goal is solutions that can be deployed, maintained, and expanded without becoming fragile over time.

By maintaining a dedicated Pi division, Themadhood can build hardware-integrated systems with consistency. PI Solutions provides the structure for stable deployments while supporting ongoing experimentation and growth.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's PI Solutions was established to support dependable Raspberry Pi systems across the Themadhood ecosystem. As part of Themadhood's Codes, it exists to create repeatable hardware-friendly solutions that are practical to deploy and maintain in real environments.

The branch supports Pi-based automation, utilities, relay systems, and structured deployments that can serve as a foundation for monitoring, response, and device coordination. Emphasis is placed on reliability, modularity, and clean system organization to keep deployments manageable over time.
PI Solutions is built for long-term operation. It helps ensure that hardware-integrated projects remain stable, consistent, and expandable while staying organized within a clear technical structure.

items.title: Themadhood's PI Relays
items.body: Relay control systems, hardware switching patterns, and dependable device control infrastructure.

items.title: Themadhood's PI Automations
items.body: Pi-driven automation workflows, device orchestration, and repeatable operational routines.

items.title: Themadhood's PI Utilities
items.body: Practical utilities for deployment, monitoring, diagnostics, and long-term device management.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific Pi subtree, including experimental Pi-based tooling.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
